ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (M/F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the athlete */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the athlete represents */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "primary_sport" TEXT /* Primary sport the athlete competes in */,
  "secondary_sport" TEXT /* Secondary sport the athlete competes in */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Notable injury history */,
  "training_regimen" TEXT /* Brief description of the athlete's training regimen */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach assigned to the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "place" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., marathon, sprint) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organization or entity organizing the event */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Sponsors of the event */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the athlete performing */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the event in which the athlete participated */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the event */,
  "overall_ranking" TEXT /* Overall ranking of the athlete in the event */,
  "by_sex_ranking" TEXT /* Ranking of the athlete by sex in the event */,
  "by_group_ranking" TEXT /* Ranking of the athlete in their age group */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the event */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Pace of the athlete */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* Split times at various stages of the event */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the event */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the event */,
  "environmental_factors" TEXT /* Environmental factors that affected the performance */,
  "coach_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the coach about the performance */,
  "athlete_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the athlete about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 20-30) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance entry being accessed or modified */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of insights from the performances */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed, comparative) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the coach (e.g., sprint, marathon) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)
